justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests, including the initial misspoken date and subsequent specific time and date requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check other times on the same day or a nearby day, but did not proactively suggest a broader range of options or different times of day until very late in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple API calls for each date and time requested by the user, even when the user was only changing the date and keeping the time and other details the same.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to find an available slot after numerous attempts and its repetitive apologies and suggestions.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context throughout the conversation, but its recovery strategy was limited to offering very similar alternatives after each unavailability, leading to a long and unproductive exchange.
